channel.title: Le Chat on Rafelia's AI LOLs
channel.description: Recent content in Le Chat on Rafelia's AI LOLs

item.title: 🇫🇷 Mistral’s ‘Le Chat’ AI Assistant Pounces onto iOS & Android! 🐱🤖
item.description: Mistral launches ‘Le Chat’—an AI chatbot for iOS & Android, taking on ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude. But will it be the cat’s meow or just another copycat? 🐱💬
